mnemonics.title: Constructor-Destructor Order
mnemonics.content: CONstruct First, DESTruct Last (CFDL) - Constructors are called first in order of creation, destructors are called last in reverse order.

mnemonics.title: Rule of Three
mnemonics.content: DCC - Destructor, Copy constructor, Copy assignment operator. If you need one, you probably need all three.

mnemonics.title: Initialization List Usage
mnemonics.content: CRB - Const members, Reference members, Base classes. These must be initialized using initialization lists.

mnemonics.title: Destructor Syntax
mnemonics.content: TILDE CLASS - Remember that destructors start with a tilde (~) followed by the class name.

mnemonics.title: Constructor Types
mnemonics.content: DPC - Default, Parameterized, Copy - The three main types of constructors.
